name: Chocolate Amaretto Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine shortening (Crisco butter-flavored is good) or margarine and chocolate. Place over low heat and stir constantly until combined.
2. Remove from heat and stir in eggs and amaretto.
3. Combine flour and salt; add to the creamed mixture, stirring well.
4. Pour batter into a lightly greased 13 x 9 x 2 inches baking pan.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes; cool.
6. Frost with Amaretto Frosting and sprinkle with sliced almonds (or arrange in floral patterns for decoration).
7. Cut into squares.
